name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Roommate from sophomore year. Now a pediatric nurse in Boston. We bond over true crime podcasts.

name: James Okafor
bio: Senior engineer who mentored me at my first job. Incredibly sharp and always has career advice ready.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Cousin based in Singapore. We grew up spending summers together. She runs her own bakery now.

name: Carlos Vega
bio: Best friend from high school. Now a football coach in Madrid. We try to catch up every month.

name: Aisha Kamara
bio: Met at a startup conference in 2023. Founded a fintech company in Nairobi. Sharp mind and great energy.

name: Tom Whitfield
bio: Next-door neighbor for 5 years. We walk our dogs together on weekends and swap book recommendations.

name: Mei-Ling Chen
bio: Study partner from grad school. Brilliant data scientist now at a research lab in Tokyo.

name: David Rosenberg
bio: Collaborated on a product launch together. Reliable, creative, and always brings snacks to meetings.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
bio: Travel companion from a backpacking trip across Southeast Asia. We still plan a new trip every year.

name: Liam Burke
bio: Younger brother living in Dublin. We talk about football, life goals, and our parents constantly.
